rungs.title: Transport & clock
rungs.summary: Sample-accurate tempo / play / stop / seek / position.

rungs.title: Mixer
rungs.summary: Multitrack gain/pan/sum, master bus, stereo meters.

rungs.summary: Pattern grid firing samples on the clock.

rungs.title: Protocol complete

milestones.experience: Load a sound, hear it on a track.
It plays through the phone's speakers.

repo_map.desc: The compounding Rust audio engine. Every merged rung lives here — one growing library.
The capability ladder: one folder per rung (contract, budget, golden tests).
The ground-truth judge — golden-test runner + perf scorer. The swarm may not touch it.
Immutable, append-only record of every scored build — the program's memory.
This static microsite, generated from the repo's own records on every push.
CI: the regression gate on every PR, and the job that publishes this dashboard.

modules.desc: The canonical perf harness, injected by the evaluator so throughput numbers can't be faked.
The engine binary: reads commands on stdin, writes events on stdout — what the tests drive.
The Daw facade: owns mixer + transport + sample bank, turns protocol commands into events.
Multitrack mixer: per-track gain + equal-power pan, master bus, stereo metering. (rung 3)
The JSON control protocol — the Command and Event wire types (serde-tagged NDJSON).
Sample playback: named PCM buffers, one-shot / looped sample voices. (rung 4)
Polyphonic sine-voice bank — the real-time DSP core that the perf harness benchmarks. (rung 1)
Sample-accurate clock: tempo, play/stop, seek, position. (rung 2)

commits.subject: Rung 4: sample playback (#18)
Rung 3: stereo multitrack mixer (#17)
Fix dashboard publishing: serve via branch-mode Pages (#16)
Pages: self-enable, no manual setup (#15)
Web dashboard on GitHub Pages — track results between builds (#14)
Deployment cadence: auto-merge on green, milestone-gated TestFlight (#13)
Mobile delivery: Expo groovebox client + EAS/TestFlight pipeline (#12)
Swarm-builds-a-DAW infrastructure: ladder, mainline engine, evaluation stack (#11)
Clarify archive references in fresh-start README
Reset repo to fresh start; archive prior audio-explorations work
